name: Android 12
notes: Earliest version the guides target for DeX-era devices. Phantom process killer can terminate Termux sessions — apply the documented workaround.

name: Android 13
notes: Stable ADL base; phantom process limits still apply on some builds.

name: Android 14
notes: Works well; per-app unknown-source install prompts became stricter.

name: Android 15
notes: Works well; check background-process settings after major updates.

name: Android 16
notes: Current reference version, verified on the Galaxy S22+. Samsung builds add Auto Blocker — see the Termux:X11 install guidance.
